creator: alex@big.endian.de
text:
Thus spake Jean-Marc Zucconi (jmz@FreeBSD.ORG):

> It is created by MAKEDEV:
> mouse*)
>         name=`expr $i : 'mouse\(.*\)'`
>         if [ ! -c $name ]; then
>                 $0 $name                        # make the appropriate device
>         fi
>         ln -fs $name mouse
>         ;;

Can't we have something similar for cdrom?

The above looks nice, could work for cdrom in a similar way.

I'd very like to see it.

Alex

-- 
I doubt, therefore I might be.
